name: Banana Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread machine to white bread setting.
2. In a bowl, mix the mashed bananas, brown sugar, and salt until well combined.
3. Add the buttermilk, instant oatmeal, steel-cut oats, yeast, and Canola oil to the banana mixture. Stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Pour the mixture into the bread machine pan and program according to the manufacturer's instructions for white bread.
5. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for a few minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
